title: FTS order=DESC results into integrity-check failing
bug_features_seed: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE vt1 (c1 TEXT, c2 INTEGER, INDEX idx_c2(c2));
CREATE TABLE t1 (id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, value VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL);
SELECT * FROM vt1 WHERE c2 IN (SELECT c2 FROM t1 WHERE value IS NOT NULL);
